user.title: Connect to Raspberry Pi
user.description: Enter the hostname or IP address of your Raspberry Pi.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the Raspberry Pi running the Heating service.

error.connection: Cannot connect — check that the Heating service is running and the host is correct.

abort.already_configured: This Raspberry Pi is already configured.

add_filter_pump.title: Add Filter Pump
add_filter_pump.description: Configure the filter pump that runs on a fixed schedule.

data_description.switch_pin_id: GPIO pin number connected to the relay switch.
data_description.start_time: Time the pump turns on every day (in your local timezone).
data_description.end_time: Time the pump turns off every day (in your local timezone).

add_heating_pump.title: Add Heating Pump
add_heating_pump.description: Configure the heating pump that reacts to temperature thresholds.

data_description.switch_pin_id: GPIO pin number connected to the relay switch.
data_description.solar_panel_sensor_key: Sensor ID of the solar panel temperature sensor.
data_description.pool_sensor_key: Sensor ID of the pool temperature sensor.
data_description.power_on_threshold: The pump turns on when the solar panel is this many °C warmer than the pool.
data_description.power_off_threshold: The pump turns off when the temperature difference drops below this threshold.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to create pump — check your connection.
